formulas.name: 1. Calculation of BMI
formulas.variables: Weight in kg, Height in meters
formulas.notes: To determine underweight, normal weight, overweight, or obese

formulas.name: 2. Calculation of BMR (Basal Metabolic Rate) for Men
formulas.formula: BMR (men) = 66 + (6.2 x weight in lbs) + (12.7 x height in inches) - (6.8 x age in years)
formulas.variables: Weight in lbs, Height in inches, Age in years
formulas.notes: To estimate daily calorie needs at rest for men

formulas.name: 3. Calculation of BMR (Basal Metabolic Rate) for Women
formulas.formula: BMR (women) = 655 + (4.35 x weight in lbs) + (4.7 x height in inches) - (4.7 x age in years)
formulas.variables: Weight in lbs, Height in inches, Age in years
formulas.notes: To estimate daily calorie needs at rest for women

formulas.name: 4. Target Heart Rate Zone (50-85% of Maximum Heart Rate)
formulas.formula: Target Heart Rate = (Maximum Heart Rate) x (Desired Intensity as a decimal)
formulas.variables: Maximum Heart Rate (usually 220 - age), Desired Intensity (e.g., 0.5 for 50%)
formulas.notes: To find the ideal heart rate range for aerobic exercise

formulas.name: 5. Maximum Heart Rate (MHR) Estimate
formulas.notes: A simple estimate of maximum heart rate

formulas.name: 6. Calculation of Daily Caloric Needs
formulas.formula: Daily Caloric Needs = BMR x Activity Multiplier
formulas.variables: BMR from formula, Activity Multiplier (sedentary=1.2, lightly active=1.375, moderately active=1.55, very active=1.725, extra active=1.9)
formulas.notes: To estimate total daily energy expenditure based on activity level

formulas.name: 7. VO2 Max Estimate (for men)
formulas.formula: VO2 Max (men) = 15 x (body weight in kg / (body weight in kg - (body fat percentage x body weight in kg)))
formulas.variables: Body weight in kg, Body fat percentage
formulas.notes: An estimate of aerobic capacity for men

formulas.name: 8. VO2 Max Estimate (for women)
formulas.formula: VO2 Max (women) = 13.5 x (body weight in kg / (body weight in kg - (body fat percentage x body weight in kg)))
formulas.variables: Body weight in kg, Body fat percentage
formulas.notes: An estimate of aerobic capacity for women

formulas.name: 9. Lean Body Mass (LBM) for Men
formulas.formula: LBM (men) = (body weight in lbs x (100 - body fat percentage)) / 100
formulas.variables: Body weight in lbs, Body fat percentage
formulas.notes: To calculate the weight of lean body mass for men

formulas.name: 10. Lean Body Mass (LBM) for Women
formulas.formula: LBM (women) = (body weight in lbs x (100 - body fat percentage)) / 100
formulas.variables: Body weight in lbs, Body fat percentage
formulas.notes: To calculate the weight of lean body mass for women
